name: Example Hack
tagline: A concise one-line pitch for judges.
description: Example Hack helps teams prepare polished Devfolio submissions with repeatable validation and preview checks.
problem: Hackathon teams often miss required submission fields or discover broken links too late.
solution: The project keeps submission data structured, validates important fields, and supports hackathon-specific preview endpoints.
challenges: Balancing generic Devfolio guidance with hackathon-specific requirements.
